§6Fruit Trees§f

§aGrow fruit and nut trees for a renewable harvest of food and ingredients.§f

HarvestCraft adds §e40+ fruit trees§f with logs, leaves, saplings, and fruit. Plant a sapling and wait for the tree to grow — leaves drop fruit when mature. §bApple§f trees generate naturally; all others come from the §bMarket§f.

§6Fruit Trees§f: Apple, Apricot, Avocado, Banana, Cherry, Date, Dragonfruit, Durian, Fig, Gooseberry, Grapefruit, Guava, Jackfruit, Lemon, Lime, Lychee, Mango, Olive, Orange, Papaya, Passion Fruit, Pawpaw, Pear, Persimmon, Plum, Pomegranate, Rambutan, Soursop, Starfruit.

§6Nut Trees§f: Almond, Cashew, Chestnut, Coconut, Hazelnut, Pecan, Pistachio, Walnut.

§6Spice Trees§f: Cinnamon, Nutmeg, Peppercorn, Tamarind, Vanilla Bean.

§6Fruit Usage§f:
§b• Juicer§f: Press fruits into §b26+ juice types§f (each restores §e2 hunger§f + Speed boost).
§b• Presser§f: Extract cooking oil from olives, sunflower seeds, and avocados.
§b• Saucepan§f: Cook fruits into §bjellies§f (27 types) and candies.
§b• Mortar and Pestle§f: Grind spices into powders for recipes.

§eTip§f: Fruit trees are a renewable food source — once established, they drop fruit periodically without replanting. Build an orchard near your base for a steady supply of juice and jelly ingredients.
